title: ASCII Diagram Extraction
scenario: Given a complex system configuration represented as an ASCII diagram, extract the dependencies between components. The output should be a list of tuples representing the dependencies in the format [('A', 'B'), ('B', 'C'), ('C', 'D')].
constraints: Must be a valid Python tuple list
Each dependency should be represented as a tuple of two strings

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the output is a valid Python tuple list.
Check if all dependencies are correctly extracted.
Verify that each dependency is represented as a tuple of two strings.
